_note: Synthetic LINKED knowledge corpus for the wiki retrieval eval (experiment/llm-wiki). No real tenant data (I3). Docs declare meta.links to model an interlinked wiki; golden cases are written so the FULL relevant set spans linked docs — that's what map-first (link-expansion) retrieval is meant to recover and a flat ranker misses. `subscriptions` is a deliberate ORPHAN (no links in/out). `mrr_metric`+`arr_metric` are a deliberate missing-connection pair (high topic overlap, no link). `Order` links to a non-existent `Coupon` to exercise broken-link detection.

docs.name: overview

meta.summary: How this storefront models sales, customers, and money.

docs.body: The business sells physical goods. Sales flow through orders; revenue is recognized on paid orders only. See the linked entities and metrics for specifics.

docs.name: revenue

meta.summary: Recognized revenue — paid orders only; refunded orders excluded entirely.

docs.body: Sum of orders.total_cents where status = 'paid', divided by 100 for dollars. Refunded orders are excluded entirely, not netted.

docs.name: net_revenue

meta.summary: Revenue net of refunds — paid minus refunded amounts.

docs.body: Recognized revenue minus refunded order amounts. Use when finance asks for net rather than gross recognized revenue.

docs.name: Customer

meta.summary: A shopper account; soft-deleted via deleted_at.

docs.body: One row per shopper. deleted_at IS NOT NULL means soft-deleted and must be excluded from active customer counts.

docs.name: Order

meta.summary: A purchase; status drives revenue recognition.

docs.body: One row per purchase. status = 'paid' counts toward revenue; 'refunded' is excluded. total_cents is integer cents. customer_id references the buyer.

docs.name: active_customers
docs.body: COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM customers WHERE deleted_at IS NULL.

docs.name: aov

meta.summary: Average order value — revenue divided by paid order count.

docs.body: SUM(total_cents) / COUNT(*) over paid orders, divided by 100 for dollars.

docs.name: money-is-cents
docs.body: All money columns are integer cents — divide by 100 for dollars.

docs.name: refunds-excluded
docs.body: Refunded orders are excluded from recognized revenue entirely — never netted into the same figure.

docs.name: soft-delete
docs.body: Rows with deleted_at set are soft-deleted; exclude them from active counts and most reporting.

docs.name: mrr_metric
docs.body: Sum of monthly subscription amounts for active subscriptions, in dollars.

docs.name: arr_metric
docs.body: Annual recurring revenue: monthly recurring revenue multiplied by 12. Reported annually to finance.

docs.name: subscriptions

meta.summary: A recurring billing plan a customer is enrolled in.

docs.body: One row per active or cancelled subscription. status and current_period_end drive billing.

retrieval.question: How much revenue did we make, net of refunds?
How many active customers do we have?
